narrative:
Ridgewood Local Sd (Coshocton) school district has 5,289 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.6 percentage points.
